focus: Configure Cloudflare Worker runtime secrets, deploy the Worker, and verify public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoints against the live cranfield-v0 OpenSearch index.
reason_started: The operator explicitly approved deployment after GEN-003 had loaded and evaluated live OpenSearch but left public endpoints blocked.
reason_ended: Cloudflare secrets were configured, the Worker deployed, public endpoints returned live OpenSearch-backed responses, and the validation gate passed twice.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 14 tests passed, MDE artifacts parsed, sample index check passed, fixture evaluation passed.

validators_executed.name: wrangler whoami
validators_executed.evidence: Wrangler auth had Workers write scope; secret/account values were redacted.

validators_executed.name: wrangler secret put
validators_executed.evidence: OpenSearch runtime secrets were uploaded without printing values.

validators_executed.name: wrangler deploy
validators_executed.evidence: Worker deployed to the public workers.dev URL.

validators_executed.name: public endpoint checks
validators_executed.evidence: Public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoints returned live cranfield-v0 responses.

validators_executed.name: second validation pass
validators_executed.evidence: Local validation and public endpoint checks passed again with no code, test, strategy, or validator changes between public checks.

validators_skipped.name: broad p95 latency sample
validators_skipped.reason: Point latency evidence was collected during endpoint validation; a larger sampled latency run is useful but not required to prove Phase 1 public availability.

github_submission.blocker: Deployment evidence remains in the working tree for review; no explicit commit or push request was made.

reusable_lessons: Cloudflare Worker secret upload can create the Worker before first deploy, so evidence should distinguish secret-created Worker existence from deployed code.
Public endpoint validation should include both canonical versioned paths and latest aliases after deployment.
downstream_impacts: Retail Search Phase 1 public baseline can now be referenced by articles or portfolio status.
Phase 2 can start from a deployed Cranfield baseline rather than deployment unblockers.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can include the public endpoint URL and live OpenSearch metrics.
evidence_quality_notes: Deployment evidence is live and public.
Endpoint checks prove real OpenSearch-backed behavior through Cloudflare.
Latency evidence is point-in-time; p95 needs a sampled run if used in public claims.

supports_mission: Exposes public search and explain endpoints.
Keeps OpenSearch as the execution engine.
Keeps v0 transparent and baseline-only without unearned ranking architecture.
missing: Phase 1 article linked to commit and endpoint.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-004 completes the public deployment requirement for the Phase 1 Cranfield Foundation.
